details.productUrlName: FINAL FANTASY VII Game Code Card

customAttributes.description: This listing is not a physical item. Please keep in mind that this Game Card listing represents a digital copy of FINAL FANTASY VII for PC. You may receive the physical Game Card. Upon purchase, please work with your specific Seller by sending them a message using the Contact Seller button on the order details in your Order History to opt in to having your Code Card code delivered digitally due to the nature of the product.
